texto: All instruction is but as a finger pointing to the moon
autor: and he whose gaze is fixed upon the pointer will never see beyond.
explicacao: Citação de and he whose gaze is fixed upon the pointer will never see beyond. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “All instruction is but as a finger pointing to the moon” articula reflexao, masaharu-anesaki, instruction em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
